## What does this PR do?
Briefly describe (1-2 sentences) the problem solved or the feature added.

## Why
Context: why is this change necessary/useful?
If it resolves an issue: Closes #123

## How
Bullet list of the main changes:
- Added function X in module Y
- Fixed bug causing Z
- Updated related tests

## How to test
Steps to verify it works:
1. `pytest tests/test_xyz.py`
2. Expected behavior: ...

## Screenshots (if applicable)
For UI changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review of the code performed
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] No new warnings generated

## Notes
Any trade-offs, known limitations, or open questions for reviewers.
